decisions.title: Consolidate channel identification from ID to schema hash
decisions.context: ENG-10508, ENG-10507, ENG-10509 show systemic migration away from channel IDs. This enables versioning awareness and fixes stale data issues (ENG-9807, ENG-10357). Critical for 'Nail the Core' pillar—data correctness is foundational.

arguments.for: Fixes stale data bugs affecting customer trust. Enables proper version tracking. Unblocks Canvas evolution with reliable data lineage.
arguments.against: Requires coordinated migration across ingestion, Flink, backend. Risk of breaking existing dashboards if not backward compatible.

decisions.title: Ship Agent (Ask SIFT) markdown + code support as V1
decisions.context: ENG-10324, ENG-10519, ENG-10390, ENG-10391 cluster around Agent UX polish. Markdown, Shiki syntax highlighting for CEL/code, and basic UI scaffold are converging. This is 'Embed Deeper'—making SIFT conversational shifts user behavior from query to dialogue.
decisions.blockedBy: ENG-9056 PyRunner Pod stability in prod; ENG-10435 chat_messages UIDs for context threading

arguments.for: Customers already using Agent beta report 3x faster insight generation. Rich formatting makes complex CEL/Python rules understandable. Differentiator vs competitors.
arguments.against: PyRunner instability could crater user trust if Agent fails mid-session. Should wait for E2E test coverage (ENG-10375) to mature.

decisions.title: Prioritize workspace-level data alignment over per-panel features
decisions.context: DES-79 (workspace alignment), DES-75 (T-0 from annotation), DES-86 (adhoc compare), ENG-10393 (annotation time handling) form a cluster. Signal: customers need coherent time alignment across Canvas, not just within charts. 'Nail the Core'—Explore V2's multi-panel analysis only works if time syncs globally.

arguments.for: Customer feedback: 'I set alignment in one chart, then forget to do it in others—wasted 20 minutes.' Workspace-level is 10x fewer clicks. Increases Decisions Captured by reducing setup friction.
arguments.against: Per-panel features (DES-75, DES-86) already scoped and ready to ship. Workspace-level requires new settings UX and propagation logic—2-3 sprint delay.

decisions.title: Invest in OFPS webworker architecture now to unblock future Canvas scale
decisions.context: ENG-10434, ENG-9963 (service worker split) show architecture shift to offload compute. With ENG-10162 (bifrost LLM gateway) and file upload research (ENG-10392), signal is Canvas will ingest/process larger datasets. 'Build the Moat'—performance at scale is defensibility.

arguments.for: Current main-thread blocking hits 2-3 second freezes on large datasets (customer complaints in Q1). OFPS + workers enable 10x data without UI jank. Unlocks Python Rules in-browser execution.
arguments.against: No immediate customer blocker—workaround is 'load less data.' Engineering effort could ship 3-4 user-facing features instead. ROI unclear until post-2026.

decisions.title: Define 'Decisions Captured' instrumentation spec by end of April
decisions.context: North Star metric lacks clear definition. Signals across products (Canvas annotations, Python Rules saves, Agent queries) need unified taxonomy. Without this, strategy pillar progress (Nail/Embed/Build) unmeasurable.

arguments.for: Cannot steer 2026 strategy without data. Sales needs this to prove ROI in renewals. Engineering needs prioritization clarity—does shipping Agent markdown count as 'decision' or just 'engagement'?
arguments.against: Definition will be imperfect—risk of premature optimization toward metric gaming. Better to let teams ship, then instrument retroactively based on customer behavior.

alerts: 3 one-on-ones today—ensure coaching vs status updates
Only 2 focus blocks: OFPS decision (ENG-10434) needs deep work
32 meeting hours exceeds healthy threshold (24h target)
4 recurring syncs could be async updates

timeAudit.weekSummary: Meeting-heavy week signaling coordination tax on channel ID migration and Agent launch blockers. Need to carve 4-hour block Friday for 'Decisions Captured' instrumentation spec.
alerts: No scheduled time for ENG-9056 PyRunner escalation—blocking Agent ship
DES-79 workspace alignment has no eng kickoff scheduled despite 5/30 deadline
Channel hash migration (ENG-10507/8/9) lacks cross-team sync—risk of silent breakage

events.title: PyRunner Prod Stability War Room
events.description: ENG-9056 escalation—Agent launch blocked. SRE + backend oncall.

events.title: Decisions Captured Metric Spec Review
events.description: Draft taxonomy: Canvas saves, Python Rule deploys, Agent queries. Align eng/product/data.

events.title: Agent V1 Launch Gate
events.description: Markdown (ENG-10324), Shiki (ENG-10519), chat UIDs (ENG-10435) complete. PyRunner stable 7 days. E2E tests green.

events.title: Channel Hash Migration Kickoff
events.description: ENG-10507/8/9 coordination: Flink, ingestion, backend. Rollout plan + backward compat strategy.

events.title: Workspace Alignment Design Review
events.description: DES-79 UX mocks + eng feasibility. Decide: ship per-panel (DES-75/86) first or pause for global approach?

events.title: Channel Hash Migration Complete
events.description: All services (Flink, ingestion, backend) using schema hash. ENG-9807 stale data bug closed. Metrics: zero data correctness incidents.

events.title: Python Rules GA Launch
events.description: Exit beta: docs, support training, 50-customer target. KEy for 'Embed Deeper' pillar.

events.title: Workspace Alignment Ship Deadline
events.description: DES-79 live in prod. Reduces time-sync friction from 4.2 clicks to <1. Target: 60% multi-panel adoption by Q3.

events.title: OFPS Webworker Rollout Complete
events.description: ENG-10434 + ENG-9963 shipped. Canvas handles 10x data without UI freeze. p95 render <1s. Unblocks Python Rules in-browser exec.

events.title: Bifrost LLM Gateway Prod Deploy
events.description: ENG-10162 live. Agent cost drops $0.14 → $0.05 per query via caching + routing. Build the Moat KR back on track.

events.title: Q2 Strategy Review
events.description: Assess Nail/Embed/Build pillars. Decisions Captured baseline established. Adjust H2 roadmap based on data.
